who.title_1: We are a residential interior team built for
who.desc: We help homeowners in Kuwait create calm, functional, and timeless interiors. Our workflow is structured, our communication is clear, and our finishing standards are high.

procedure.title: Our work procedure
procedure.desc: A clear process that keeps timelines predictable and decisions easy.

1.title: Client design consultation

residential.title: Residential Interior Design
residential.short: End-to-end residential design for villas and apartments with a clear workflow and premium finishing.

bullets.1: Define the design direction and space identity
bullets.2: Functional planning for furniture, circulation, and zones
bullets.3: Materials, colors, and lighting aligned to your lifestyle
bullets.4: Execution-ready deliverables with support through the build

highlights.2: Materials and finishing aligned to your budget
highlights.3: Consistent delivery from concept to handover

timeline.value: Depends on project size — typically 3–8 weeks for design phase

scope.value: Villas and apartments — full home or selected areas

1.title: Consultation & requirements
1.desc: We capture your needs, taste, and priorities, and define the scope.

2.title: Concept & planning
2.desc: We develop layout direction, mood, and material options.

3.title: Detailing & handover
3.desc: We finalize execution deliverables and review details for site readiness.

1.a: Yes — supervision options are available depending on your package.

2.q: Can you design a single room only?
2.a: Yes — we can handle one space (living, majlis, bedroom, etc.) or a full home.

renovation.title: Apartment Renovation
renovation.short: A structured renovation plan with premium finishing direction and clear execution milestones.

bullets.1: Improve layouts and functionality based on your needs
bullets.2: Finishing solutions that respect budget without sacrificing quality
bullets.3: Organized material, flooring, and lighting selections
bullets.4: Execution follow-up for a handover-ready result

highlights.1: Clear plan that reduces on-site rework
highlights.2: Materials chosen for daily use and longevity

timeline.value: Typically 2–6 weeks depending on change scope

scope.value: Partial or full apartment renovation (layout / finishes / upgrades)

1.title: Site assessment
1.desc: We review constraints, opportunities, and required changes.

2.title: Planning & options
2.desc: We present layout/material options and estimate scope.

3.title: Execution & handover
3.desc: We follow up on finishing and coordination through delivery.

1.q: Can you renovate while keeping some existing furniture?
1.a: Yes — we can design around existing pieces when required.

fitout.title: Turnkey Fit-Out
fitout.short: From design to execution: coordination, supervision, and premium handover with clear quality controls.

bullets.2: Premium finishing standards with clear checkpoints

highlights.3: Clear inspections and final snag closure

deliverables.3: Final snag list and structured handover

timeline.value: Depends on project size — typically 6 weeks to several months

scope.value: Residential turnkey execution including coordination, supervision, and delivery

1.title: Finalize execution scope
1.desc: We lock materials, scope, and site plan before starting.

2.title: Coordination & supervision
2.desc: We track daily progress, quality, and site coordination.

3.title: Inspection & handover
3.desc: We close snags and run final checks for a clean handover.

1.a: Procurement can be included depending on the package and project needs.

kitchen.title: Kitchen Design
kitchen.short: Practical kitchen planning with durable cabinetry, smart storage, and execution-ready details.

bullets.1: Functional layout based on workflow and circulation
bullets.2: Durable cabinetry and countertop material direction
bullets.3: Clear MEP and lighting coordination guidance

highlights.2: Durable materials that are easy to maintain
highlights.3: Balanced design: looks premium, works daily

timeline.value: Typically 2–4 weeks depending on kitchen size

scope.value: Apartment and villa kitchens — new build or full upgrade

1.title: Measure & requirements
1.desc: We define usage, appliances, and storage priorities.

2.title: Layout & materials
2.desc: We propose layout options and aligned finishing.

3.title: Execution details
3.desc: We finalize dimensions and production-ready notes.

1.q: Do you help with appliance selection?
1.a: Yes — we guide sizes and placements to fit the final plan.

bathroom.title: Bathroom Design
bathroom.short: Premium bathroom layouts with moisture-ready materials and execution-level detailing.

bullets.2: Tile palettes and waterproof material direction
bullets.4: Detailed drawings ready for site execution

highlights.1: Solutions for both compact and spacious bathrooms

scope.value: Guest / master / kids bathrooms — design or full renovation

1.title: Constraints review
1.desc: We review plumbing constraints and choose the best layout.

2.title: Materials & palette
2.desc: We prepare material options with budget-aligned alternatives.

3.title: Execution detailing
3.desc: We finalize heights, dimensions, and accessory positions.

1.a: Yes — we offer multiple options while keeping the same overall look.

flooring.title: Flooring & Materials
flooring.short: A clear material strategy with samples, alternatives, and specifications aligned to your project goals.

bullets.1: Flooring selection based on durability and maintenance
bullets.4: Clear specifications for procurement and execution

highlights.2: Full harmony across floors, walls, and lighting

timeline.value: Typically 1–2 weeks to finalize materials and alternatives

scope.value: Materials, finishes, and flooring strategy by area

1.title: Lifestyle analysis
1.desc: We align materials to daily use, kids/pets, and durability needs.

2.title: Materials proposal
2.desc: We propose a coherent set with cost-tier alternatives.

3.title: Finalize specifications
3.desc: We lock specs into clear supplier/execution notes.

1.a: We guide sample sourcing from the market and support selection.

lighting.title: Lighting Design
lighting.short: Lighting that supports mood and function: layered layouts, scene planning, and curated fixture direction.

bullets.1: Layered lighting: functional + ambient by space
bullets.2: Fixture recommendations aligned to the design
bullets.4: Execution guidance for dimming and controls

highlights.3: Clean coordination with gypsum and furniture

timeline.value: Typically 1–3 weeks depending on number of spaces

scope.value: Residential lighting for apartments and villas (zones or full scope)

1.title: Needs analysis
1.desc: We define task zones, relaxation zones, and required lux levels.

2.title: Layout & scenes
2.desc: We design layers and propose scene logic.

3.title: Fixture selection
3.desc: We recommend fixtures and finalize execution notes.

1.q: Does this include market fixture selection?
1.a: Yes — we provide curated options aligned to style and budget.

spacePlanning.title: Space Planning
spacePlanning.short: Optimized furniture layouts and circulation planning that makes daily living smoother and more functional.

bullets.2: Realistic furniture layouts based on dimensions
bullets.3: Storage ideas and usage zones definition
bullets.4: Multiple options before locking a final plan

timeline.value: Typically 1–2 weeks depending on number of spaces

1.title: Lifestyle capture
1.desc: We align layouts to your daily routine and preferences.

2.title: Layout options
2.desc: We balance flow, function, and aesthetics through variants.

3.title: Lock & detail
3.desc: We finalize the best option and confirm dimensions.

1.q: Do I need exact furniture dimensions?
1.a: Preferred, but we can start with standard ranges then refine later.

joinery.title: Custom Joinery
joinery.short: Bespoke built-ins with production-ready detailing: wardrobes, TV walls, storage, and more.

bullets.1: Design for wardrobes, TV walls, storage, and built-ins

timeline.value: Typically 2–4 weeks depending on number of items

scope.value: Built-ins (wardrobes / TV units / storage / custom joinery)

1.title: Requirements & planning
1.desc: We define functions, storage needs, and visual direction.

2.title: Design & detailing
2.desc: We produce elevations, internals, and sizing.

3.title: Finalize & coordinate
3.desc: We review final specs and support during production.

1.q: Can this be executed by any carpenter?
1.a: Yes — as long as the contractor follows the approved specifications.
